channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19362] IPv6 sanity-scrub test_19: FAIL: (2) Fail to start ost1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/62979969-7d0f-49ff-b41e-f4980f786e3d

test_19 failed with the following error:

CMD: trevis-34vm4 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-ost1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov -o user_xattr,noscrub  /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey /mnt/lustre-ost1
trevis-34vm4: mount.lustre: mount /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey at /mnt/lustre-ost1 failed: Invalid argument
trevis-34vm4: This may have multiple causes.
trevis-34vm4: Are the mount options correct?
trevis-34vm4: Check the syslog for more info.
pdsh@trevis-34vm1: trevis-34vm4: ssh exited with exit code 22
CMD: trevis-34vm4 e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 2>/dev/null
CMD: trevis-34vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param 				seq.cli-lustre-OST0000-super.width=32768
trevis-34vm4: error: set_param: param_path 'seq/cli-lustre-OST0000-super/width': No such file or directory
trevis-34vm4: error: set_param: setting 'seq/cli-lustre-OST0000-super/width'='32768': No such file or directory
pdsh@trevis-34vm1: trevis-34vm4: ssh exited with exit code 2
 sanity-scrub test_19: @@@@@@ FAIL: (2) Fail to start ost1

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4652 - 5.14.0-570.37.1.el9_6.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4652 - 5.14.0-570.37.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

Console log on OSS:

[ 4010.692832] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-ost1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov -o user_xattr,noscrub /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey /mnt/lustre-ost1
[ 4010.988934] LDISKFS-fs (dm-9): mounted filesystem 89773d7d-452d-44db-93f6-d61959a6a57e r/w with ordered data mode. Quota mode: journalled.
[ 4011.038128] LustreError: 153068:0:(tgt_mount.c:1258:server_lsi2mti()) Failed to get NID for server lustre-OST0000, please check whether the target is specifed with improper --servicenode or --network options.
[ 4011.038389] LustreError: 153068:0:(tgt_mount.c:2460:server_fill_super()) Unable to start targets: -22
[ 4011.038552] LustreError: 153068:0:(tgt_mount.c:1954:server_put_super()) no obd lustre-OST0000
[ 4011.038649] LustreError: 153068:0:(tgt_mount.c:117:server_deregister_mount()) lustre-OST0000 not registered
[ 4011.041997] LustreError: 153068:0:(obd_class.h:478:obd_check_dev()) Device 1 not setup
[ 4011.042096] LustreError: 153068:0:(obd_class.h:478:obd_check_dev()) Skipped 33 previous similar messages
[ 4011.102470] Lustre: server umount lustre-OST0000 complete
[ 4011.102616] LustreError: 153068:0:(super25.c:180:lustre_fill_super()) llite: Unable to mount <unknown>: rc = -22
[ 4011.112182] LDISKFS-fs (dm-9): unmounting filesystem 89773d7d-452d-44db-93f6-d61959a6a57e.
[ 4011.326603] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 2>/dev/null
[ 4011.778037] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param seq.cli-lustre-OST0000-super.width=32768
[ 4012.264640] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark sanity-scrub test_19: @@@@@@ FAIL: (2) Fail to start ost1
[ 4012.510133] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: sanity-scrub test_19: @@@@@@ FAIL: (2) Fail to start ost1
item.summary: IPv6 sanity-scrub test_19: FAIL: (2) Fail to start ost1

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
The above issues were fixed in master build #4655:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/366f2fed-c52b-46bf-bffc-2773dbea849b

The following subtests failed with the similar issue:
replay-single test 117: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/4f1694b9-cd42-49b7-920c-d5acb7090b69
sanity-lfsck test 11a: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/c8fab193-939c-499d-a726-bf400dca6a02
recovery-small test 136: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/2acbced4-1b81-4138-95a7-530562dd644b
conf-sanity: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/a2c74bb0-fc54-4206-a043-000429f3c252
